requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated / Conducted Emissions (SLSI / SLS Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——辐射/传导发射（SLSI / SLS标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——輻射/傳導發射（SLSI / SLS標準）

summary.en: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) adopts SLS standards aligned with IEC/CISPR for electromagnetic compatibility. Wireless devices must comply with applicable SLSI/SLS EMC emission limits (radiated and conducted emissions), consistent with CISPR 32 or equivalent IEC-aligned SLS standards. Testing may be performed at CISIR (Ceylon Institute of Scientific and Industrial Research) or an overseas accredited laboratory whose reports TRCSL and SLSI may accept. No standalone CE-marking or FCC SDoC is recognised as equivalent.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡标准化机构（SLSI）采用与IEC/CISPR对齐的SLS标准用于电磁兼容。无线设备须符合适用的SLSI/SLS电磁兼容发射限值（辐射及传导发射），与CISPR 32或等效IEC对齐SLS标准一致。测试可在CISIR（锡兰科学与工业研究院）或海外认可实验室进行（TRCSL及SLSI可接受其报告）。CE标志或FCC SDoC均不被认可为等效文件。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡標準化機構（SLSI）採用與IEC/CISPR對齊的SLS標準用於電磁相容。無線裝置須符合適用的SLSI/SLS電磁相容發射限值（輻射及傳導發射），與CISPR 32或等效IEC對齊SLS標準一致。測試可在CISIR（錫蘭科學與工業研究院）或海外認可實驗室進行（TRCSL及SLSI可接受其報告）。CE標誌或FCC SDoC均不被認可為等效文件。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 32: Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic emissions requirements
Sri Lanka Telecommunications Act No. 25 of 1991 (as amended)

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 (EMC emissions for IT equipment, aligned with CISPR 32) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2) are the primary Chinese EMC emission standards for wireless/IoT devices. These are GB national standards enforced under CCC and SRRC frameworks.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254（IT设备电磁兼容发射，与CISPR 32对齐）及GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，与IEC 61000-3-2对齐）是无线/物联网设备的主要中国电磁兼容发射标准，在CCC和SRRC框架下执行。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254（IT設備電磁相容發射，與CISPR 32對齊）及GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，與IEC 61000-3-2對齊）是無線/物聯網裝置的主要中國電磁相容發射標準，在CCC和SRRC框架下執行。

gap.en: Partial gap: Chinese GB/T 9254 is CISPR 32-aligned and test data may be reusable, but formal SLSI/SLS compliance documentation or a TRCSL-accepted test report from an accredited lab is needed. CE and FCC SDoC are not directly accepted.
gap.zh: 部分差距：中国GB/T 9254与CISPR 32对齐，测试数据或可复用，但须提供正式的SLSI/SLS合规文件或经TRCSL认可的认可实验室测试报告。CE标志及FCC SDoC不被直接接受。
gap.zht: 部分差距：中國GB/T 9254與CISPR 32對齊，測試數據或可復用，但須提供正式的SLSI/SLS合規文件或經TRCSL認可的認可實驗室測試報告。CE標誌及FCC SDoC不被直接接受。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 9254 test data (CISPR 32-aligned) may assist TRCSL review but does not itself satisfy SLSI/SLS compliance requirements. An accredited-lab test report referencing applicable SLS/IEC/CISPR standards is needed for Sri Lanka market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 9254测试数据（CISPR 32对齐）或可辅助TRCSL审查，但本身不满足SLSI/SLS合规要求。进入斯里兰卡市场须提供引用适用SLS/IEC/CISPR标准的认可实验室测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 9254測試數據（CISPR 32對齊）或可輔助TRCSL審查，但本身不滿足SLSI/SLS合規要求。進入斯里蘭卡市場須提供引用適用SLS/IEC/CISPR標準的認可實驗室測試報告。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——抗扰度（SLSI / SLS标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——抗擾度（SLSI / SLS標準）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices placed on the Sri Lanka market should comply with immunity requirements under applicable SLSI/SLS standards aligned with CISPR 35 (multimedia equipment immunity) and the IEC 61000 series. SLSI adopts IEC-aligned immunity standards for electronic equipment. Testing at CISIR or an overseas accredited lab is the typical route; TRCSL may accept accredited lab reports.
summary.zh: 在斯里兰卡市场销售的无线及物联网设备须符合适用SLSI/SLS标准中的抗扰度要求，与CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度）及IEC 61000系列对齐。SLSI为电子设备采用IEC对齐抗扰度标准。通常在CISIR或海外认可实验室进行测试；TRCSL可接受认可实验室报告。
summary.zht: 在斯里蘭卡市場銷售的無線及物聯網裝置須符合適用SLSI/SLS標準中的抗擾度要求，與CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度）及IEC 61000系列對齊。SLSI為電子設備採用IEC對齊抗擾度標準。通常在CISIR或海外認可實驗室進行測試；TRCSL可接受認可實驗室報告。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 35: Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic immunity requirements

summary.en: China GB/T 17618 (EMC immunity for IT equipment, aligned with CISPR 35) and the GB/T 17626 series (aligned with IEC 61000-4 test methods) apply to wireless/IoT devices in China.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 17618（IT设备电磁兼容抗扰度，与CISPR 35对齐）及GB/T 17626系列（与IEC 61000-4测试方法对齐）适用于中国的无线/物联网设备。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 17618（IT設備電磁相容抗擾度，與CISPR 35對齊）及GB/T 17626系列（與IEC 61000-4測試方法對齊）適用於中國的無線/物聯網裝置。

gap.en: Partial gap: Chinese GB/T 17618 / GB/T 17626 series are IEC/CISPR-aligned; existing immunity test data may be reusable if covered by an accredited lab report. Explicit SLSI/SLS reference in the report and TRCSL acceptance required.
gap.zh: 部分差距：中国GB/T 17618 / GB/T 17626系列与IEC/CISPR对齐，若由认可实验室报告覆盖，现有抗扰度测试数据或可复用。报告中须明确引用SLSI/SLS标准，并须经TRCSL接受。
gap.zht: 部分差距：中國GB/T 17618 / GB/T 17626系列與IEC/CISPR對齊，若由認可實驗室報告覆蓋，現有抗擾度測試數據或可復用。報告中須明確引用SLSI/SLS標準，並須經TRCSL接受。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese IEC-aligned immunity test data may be reusable for SLSI/SLS compliance purposes, subject to TRCSL review and acceptance of the accredited lab report referencing applicable IEC/CISPR standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国与IEC对齐的抗扰度测试数据或可用于SLSI/SLS合规，但须经TRCSL审查并接受引用适用IEC/CISPR标准的认可实验室报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國與IEC對齊的抗擾度測試數據或可用於SLSI/SLS合規，但須經TRCSL審查並接受引用適用IEC/CISPR標準的認可實驗室報告。
